name: Guest
description: Default role for all new users. Restricted access.

name: Member
description: Trusted community member — earned 100 XP through voice activity.

name: Veteran
description: Seasoned member — 500+ XP earned. Shows dedication to the community.

name: Elite
description: Voice activity champion — over 1000 XP. Priority speaker privileges granted.

name: Support
description: Handles support tickets and helps users. Can read all channels but cannot modify them.

name: Moderator
description: Manages users and channels. Can kick, ban, move users. Creates temporary channels.

name: Admin
description: Full server control — manage groups, permissions, server settings. Cannot create snapshots.

name: Owner
description: Server founder with absolute power. Can create and deploy snapshots, modify any permission.

name: Bot
description: Bot accounts — server query access only, no voice, no talk.
